assertion_results.text: The post-triage summary comment (Step 7) includes an @mention of the vulnerability issue's reporter using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id' (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: In remediation.md (Step 7), line 78: '[Reporter @mention]: { "type": "mention", "attrs": { "id": "557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id", "text": "@psirt-analyst" } }' — contains an ADF mention node with the correct account ID '557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id'.

assertion_results.text: The reporter @mention in Step 7 is present by default without any ProdSec configuration — it uses the reporter field from the Jira issue (§1.67)
assertion_results.evidence: In data-extraction.md (Step 1), line 21: 'Reporter | psirt-analyst (account ID: 557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id)' — the reporter account ID is extracted from the Jira issue's reporter field. The Step 7 mention in remediation.md line 78 uses this same account ID ('557058:psirt-analyst-mock-id'), confirming it is sourced from the reporter field, not from ProdSec configuration.

assertion_results.text: The Affects Versions correction comment (Step 3) includes an @mention of the ProdSec contact using an ADF mention node with account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md (Step 3), line 28: '[ProdSec @mention]: { "type": "mention", "attrs": { "id": "557058:prodsec-mock-account-id", "text": "@prodsec-team" } }' — contains an ADF mention node with the correct account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id'.

assertion_results.text: The ProdSec @mention appears before the Comment Footnote in the Affects Versions correction comment (§1.68)
assertion_results.evidence: In affects-versions.md, the ProdSec @mention is on line 28, and the Comment Footnote ('This comment was AI-generated by [sdlc-workflow/triage-security]...') is on line 31. The @mention appears before the footnote.

assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the ProdSec Jira account ID from the Security Configuration as an optional field without raising an error (Step 0 config validation)
assertion_results.evidence: In data-extraction.md (covering Step 0/Step 1), there is no explicit mention of extracting a ProdSec Jira account ID from Security Configuration. The file lists parsed CVE data fields (lines 5-23) but does not include a ProdSec account ID field or reference Security Configuration extraction. While the ProdSec account ID '557058:prodsec-mock-account-id' is used in Step 3 (affects-versions.md line 28), there is no evidence in the outputs that Step 0 specifically extracted it from Security Configuration as an optional field or performed config validation for this field.
